name: Plan for new Segoe Fluent Icons · unoplatform uno · Discussion #6493
snippet: The Segoe Fluent Icons seem to be replacing Segoe MDL2 Assets icons starting with Windows 11. Downloading these new Fluent icons here. Gives a EULA.

name: Segoe Fluent Icons font - Windows apps | Microsoft Learn
snippet: On Windows 10: Segoe Fluent Icons is not included by default on Windows 10. You can download it from the Design resources page.

name: Where would one get these modern settings icons from? They look
snippet: These are from the Segoe Fluent Icon pack, which comes bundled with Windows 11. You can download the pack here. Can I use Segoe MDL2 Assets font family for a commercial project? In Windows, Where can I find these icons? : r/Windows11 - Reddit More results from www.reddit.com

name: Using Segoe Fluent Icons - Figma Forum

name: LMD-Tools Font Image List Guide
snippet: Segoe Fluent Icons is a new Windows 11 font, which provides updated round corner icons in Windows 11 style. It is not installed by default in Windows 10.
